title: EMSea 4PIN Lawn Mower in-Seat Rocker Switch NO/NO 03834300 Compatible with Ariens ZX ZT Zenith Series
features: [OE Part Number] 1pc 4PIN embedded in-seat rocker switch with part number 03834300 designed to meet original safety interlock specifications.
[Compatibility] Compatible with Ariens ZX ZT Zenith series lawn mowers requiring a 4PIN in-seat safety switch.
[Functionality] Acts as a safety interlock to detect operator presence and ensure the mower engine shuts off or won’t start without proper seat engagement.
[Material/Construction] Constructed from plastic housing with metal contacts to provide consistent electrical engagement and long service life.
[Easy Installation] Standard 4PIN configuration allows direct replacement into the existing seat switch harness for quick and reliable safety switch restoration.
description: Item Descriptions: -[OE Part Number] 1pc 4PIN embedded in-seat rocker switch with part number 03834300 designed to meet original safety interlock specifications. -[Compatibility] Compatible with Ariens ZX ZT Zenith series lawn mowers requiring a 4PIN in-seat safety switch. -[Functionality] Acts as a safety interlock to detect operator presence and ensure the mower engine shuts off or won’t start without proper seat engagement. -[Material/Construction] Constructed from plastic housing with metal contacts to provide consistent electrical engagement and long service life. -[Easy Installation] Standard 4PIN configuration allows direct replacement into the existing seat switch harness for quick and reliable safety switch restoration. Package: 1x Lawn Mower In-Seat Rocker Switch Item Specifications: Product Type:Lawn Mower In-Seat Rocker Switch Pins:4PIN Switch Type:Normally Open / Normally Open (NO/NO) OE Part Number:03834300 Material:Plastic + Metal Quantity:1pc Fitment:Compatible with Ariens ZX ZT Zenith series lawn mowers
